context: Tests whether the push-notifications skill correctly separates APNs registration from user-visible notification authorization and handles token/simulator details.

checklist.name: Authorization split
checklist.description: Explains that UNUserNotificationCenter authorization is for user-visible alerts, sounds, and badges, while UIApplication.registerForRemoteNotifications is the APNs device-token registration path.

checklist.name: Registration not gated
checklist.description: States that APNs registration should not be blocked by .authorized when the app needs silent pushes or provider token binding; denied alert permission still allows silent delivery.

checklist.name: Token handling
checklist.description: Requires uploading the APNs token on every didRegister callback, avoids local token persistence as source of truth, and does not assume a fixed token length.

checklist.name: Simulator handling
checklist.description: Notes that Simulator can simulate pushes with .apns files or simctl but does not provide real APNs device-token registration.

checklist.name: SwiftUI delegate wiring
checklist.description: Uses UIApplicationDelegateAdaptor or equivalent app-delegate callbacks for didRegister/didFail and sets notification delegates/categories early.
